claims.claim: High-entropy Ollama fallback, especially the `gemma3:4b` compatibility tail, can flatten restless/heaving lattice texture unless the fallback prompt explicitly preserves high-entropy texture when `spectral_entropy > 0.85`.
claims.rationale: Added `fallback_entropy_texture_preservation_v1` as prompt metadata that activates at spectral entropy >= 0.85, carries `FALLBACK_TEXTURE_RESTLESS_LATTICE_TERMS`, and names the directive as prompt metadata only, not sampler/provider/control authority.

claims.claim: When `stable_core_semantic_trickle` exists but regulator drive is 0.000, the bridge should keep enough weight to distinguish heaving/stutter-flow from blankness.
claims.rationale: Existing LLM and bridge surfaces already expose semantic-trickle prompt terms, `high_entropy_optional_bridge_words_not_sprawl`, low-trickle noise/silt review, and stable-core permeability review without changing controller behavior.
